name: Beef Pot Roast
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Chicken stock (or canned low-sodium chicken broth)
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil in a pot over medium heat.
2. Add the meat and brown well on both sides. Remove the meat and pour out the fat.
3. Replace the meat and add onion, carrot, and Coca-Cola to the pot.
4. Cook for 5 minutes over medium heat.
5. Add stock (or canned low-sodium chicken broth) and salt, then cover and cook for 1 hour and 15 minutes or until the meat is tender.
6. Add peas and continue cooking for an additional 5 minutes.
